zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Watts於大約1478年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親John Watts30歲，母親Beatrix25歲。她於1498年與Robert Moulton在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年之後在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Watts于大约1478年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲John Watts30岁，母亲Beatrix25岁。她于1498年与Robert Moulton在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年之后在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Watts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Watt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watt
meanings: Scottish and English: from the common Middle English personal name, Wat(t), a short form of Walter .
West African (Senegal and Mauritania): Tukulor name of unexplained etymology.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 屈, possibly based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Qu   3.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Watts was born about 1478, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Watts, was 30 and her mother, Beatrix, was 25. She married Robert Moulton in 1498, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1547, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Watts est née environ 1478, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Watts, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrix, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Moulton en 1498, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1547, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Watts um 1478 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Watts 30 und ihre Mutter Beatrix 25. Sie hat 1498 in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England Robert Moulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1547 in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Watts è nata il circa 1478 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Watts, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Beatrix, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Robert Moulton nel 1498, nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1547, nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England.

ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルク
ja.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレット
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wattsが約1478年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父John Wattsは30歳，母Beatrixは25歳であった。1498年にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットでRobert Moultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年以後にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Watts(이)가 대략 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Watts(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 Robert Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 이후 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 사망했다.

pt.from 4 June 1535 to 5 July 1535: de 4 de junho de 1535 a 5 de julho de 1535
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Watts nasceu aproximadamente 1478, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Watts, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Moulton em 1498, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1547, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Watts родилась около 1478 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Watts было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Moulton в 1498 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1547 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия.
